TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Mahavun (Mamahavunna, šĻÖÁĺéťÉ®ŤźĹ) ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Sin'iy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 256 buwan, 943 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 88% kyan ku 830 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 12% kyan ku 113 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 69%, Cou 15%, Tayan 2%, Amis 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Mahavun hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Mahavun hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Mahavun hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Mahavun hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Mahavun hya' ga Halusipun. tay mkyahu' na Mahavun hya' ga Kalibuan. tay 'llaw na Mahavun hya' ga Qalipusungan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč mańßa*un (mamańßa*unna, ****) …£a nija mki s~…ēku nanto keŇč atu s~…ēin Ēij …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, ő≤unun **%, ¶~ ®ou **%, tajan *%, amis~…ē *%. maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran, Ňčas~…ēal ps~…ēatu te…£ami ru pqniqan iju. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na mańßa*un ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj Ēzil na mańßa*un ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkjańßu Ē na mańßa*un ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkraja Ē na mańßa*un ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkraja Ē na mańßa*un ńßja Ē …£a ńßalus~…ēipun. taj mkjańßu Ē na mańßa*un ńßja Ē …£a kaliő≤uan. taj Ēllaw na mańßa*un ńßja Ē …£a qalipus~…ēuŇčan. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj. pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
S.FORM: alang Mahavun (Mamahavunna, šĻÖÁĺéťÉ®ŤźĹ) ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Sin'iy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 256 buwan, 943 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 88% kyan ku 830 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 12% kyan ku 113 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 69%, Cou 15%, Tayan 2%, Amis 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Mahavun hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Mahavun hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Mahavun hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Mahavun hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Mahavun hya' ga Halusipun. tay mkyahu' na Mahavun hya' ga Kalibuan. tay 'llaw na Mahavun hya' ga Qalipusungan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč mańßa*un (mamańßa*unna, ****) …£a nija mki s~…ēku nanto keŇč atu s~…ēin Ēij …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, ő≤unun **%, ¶~ ®ou **%, tajan *%, amis~…ē *%. maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran, Ňčas~…ēal ps~…ēatu te…£ami ru pqniqan iju. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na mańßa*un ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj Ēzil na mańßa*un ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkjańßu Ē na mańßa*un ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkraja Ē na mańßa*un ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkraja Ē na mańßa*un ńßja Ē …£a ńßalus~…ēipun. taj mkjańßu Ē na mańßa*un ńßja Ē …£a kaliő≤uan. taj Ēllaw na mańßa*un ńßja Ē …£a qalipus~…ēuŇčan. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj. pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
